rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use helper declarations to align assumed types with actual expression types
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contract elements are syntactically valid and use visible symbols
Express boundedness guarantees using comparison expressions with helper declarations
Structure AGREE annex blocks to reflect component type and implementation scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use bool helper declarations for range comparisons in AGREE contracts
Place component-level contracts in component type scopes, not implementations
anti_patterns: Avoid mismatched types between assumed declarations and actual expressions in AGREE
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts
